$comment: Single source of truth for the model -> context-window table used by the claude-sessions token report and the live agent engine. Updating a window is a DATA edit here, not a code change. Context windows are a property of the model AND the platform it runs on, and both move over time, so there is no way to derive this offline; the transcript only gives us the model id string. Match is case-insensitive `contains` on the lowercased model id, so `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-opus-4-8-v1`, etc. all hit a family whose `contains` is `opus-4-8`. First matching family wins, so order most-specific-first if two needles could overlap. Anything not matched is reported as UNKNOWN (a guess at `defaultWindow`), which callers surface instead of silently trusting.
